---
title: "Trade Shocks and Political Change in Local Labor Markets"
author:
  - "Yana Samanta"
  - "Rachel Williams"
  - "Yuxiao Li"
  - "Rishav Roy"
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    geometry:
      - margin=1in
    fontsize: 11pt
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
    fig-pos: "H"
    keep-tex: true
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{booktabs}
        \usepackage{longtable}
        \usepackage{array}
        \usepackage{float}
        \usepackage{xcolor}
        \usepackage{caption}
        \usepackage{fvextra}
        \DefineVerbatimEnvironment{Highlighting}{Verbatim}{breaklines,breakanywhere,commandchars=\\\{\}}
bibliography: references.bib
link-citations: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
fmt_num <- function(x, digits = 3) ifelse(is.na(x), "", formatC(x, digits = digits, format = "f"))
output_path <- function(...) file.path("..", "output", ...)
report_kable <- function(x, caption = NULL, longtable = FALSE, digits = 3, align = NULL) {
  knitr::kable(x, booktabs = TRUE, longtable = longtable, caption = caption, digits = digits, align = align)
}
```

# Summary

{{< include sections/00_summary_yana.qmd >}}

# Introduction

{{< include sections/01_intro_rachel.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/02_causal_challenges_yana.qmd >}}

# Data

{{< include sections/03_data_yana.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/04_summary_stats_yuxiao.qmd >}}

# Analysis and Findings

{{< include sections/05_identification_yuxiao.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/06_reproduction_yuxiao.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/07_extension_rishav.qmd >}}

# Conclusion

{{< include sections/08_conclusion_rishav.qmd >}}

# References

::: {#refs}
:::

\newpage
\appendix

{{< include sections/09_appendices_rishav.qmd >}}
